tulsbotTasks.title: Email Governance & Capture OS — Final Plan (Approval)
Credential inventory + secret checks for active integrations only
Google Calendar MCP integration (scheduling from chat)
Governance validation: draft-only outbound + approval gates intact
UptimeRobot monitoring
Tailscale ACLs hardening
Financial tracking (QuickBooks integration)
Meeting intelligence (when meeting volume justifies)
GoDaddy CNAME: mc.tulsbot.com → tunnel (verify DNS)
Connect Plaud device to Mac Mini for automatic exports
Locate Plaud export directory on Mac Mini
Google OAuth client secret rotation — deferred by policy (only rotate if/when a concrete security issue is detected).
Codex Pro OAuth/profile configured (`openai-codex:default` present in auth profiles; usage stats active).
`pmset` policy applied (`disksleep 0`, `powernap 0`) and verified via `pmset -g custom`.
After re-auth, run a send smoke test: `gog gmail send --account tulsbot@gmail.com --to ferro.tulio@gmail.com --subject "GOG auth test" --body "Auth OK" --no-input`.
Re-auth `gog` for `tulsbot@gmail.com` on Mac Mini (browser consent) so outbound Gmail sends resume without keyring prompt.
Document runbook/SOP for ongoing governance maintenance
Pilot with top 3 WhatsApp groups + 1 Plaud call flow, then tune extraction/routing rules
Implement thread lifecycle states (`active`, `waiting`, `sorted`, `archived`) with auto move-out-of-inbox on `sorted`
Add AI summary-at-top refresh on every thread update (status, pending asks, owner, next step, blockers)
Implement thread-page updater: same thread -> same Notion page; append all message bodies chronologically (inbound + outbound)
Enforce email dedup invariant (`provider+account+threadId`, fallback `messageId`) with upsert-only behavior
Enforce Notion Email label policy (`Keep in Inbox` vs `Skip Inbox` + `Capture=true/false`) as capture intake gate
Implement inbox-router gating logic so `Archive/Ignore` sources are skipped automatically
Add `Calls/Plaud` governance properties (processing depth, confidentiality, routing targets)
Create `Capture Highlights` DB (key updates, decisions, actions, risks) linked to group/contact/project
Create `WhatsApp Groups` DB (group id, members, monitor mode: Monitor/Archive/Ignore, priority, owner)
Add/confirm `Contacts` DB as canonical people registry for governance relations
Design Notion schema for `Capture Governance` (source-level rules, monitor modes, routing, retention, sensitivity)
FetchSERP rank monitoring
GA4 MCP integration
GSC MCP integration
YouTube transcript ingestion flow
RSS parser workflow for daily/weekly digests
Exa MCP (semantic research, optional)
Tavily MCP (primary web research)
Markitdown/Doc-to-Markdown integration for document normalization
Firecrawl/Website crawl integration for knowledge ingestion
Google Sheets MCP integration (operational logs + lead/report append)
Gmail MCP integration DEPRECATED (2026-03-07 by user direction)
Notion MCP integration DEPRECATED (2026-03-07 by user direction)
HubSpot MCP integration DEPRECATED (2026-03-07 by user direction)
Apply queued cross-surface Discord publish/pin actions after explicit approvals
Publish before/after architecture map + rollback notes (see `memory/discord/audit-log-*`)
Governance controls: enforce draft-only outbound + explicit `APPROVE <id>` / `REJECT <id>` gates
Phase 4 automation: map briefing/reporting/enrichment/maintenance flows to canonical Discord channels and propose cron/system-event remap (`DC-AUTO-001`)
Phase 3 migration: define Discord-first daily operations model; Telegram retained as ingress/backup path
Phase 2 policy pass: enforce one-context-per-channel/thread and prepare pinned channel contracts (purpose, model tier, approval rules); live publish queued via `DC-CONTRACT-*`
Phase 1 IA cleanup: hard-archive duplicate/legacy categories/channels while preserving lock list
Phase 0 health gate: snapshot current Discord IA, validate permissions, freeze protected channels (`daily-standup`, `inbox-capture`, `builder`, `research`, `daily-reports`, `tulsday`)
